snapshot.Name: Demiurg Drone/turret Controller
snapshot.Description: To activate a drone controller, a character must make a Challenging (+0) Tech-Use Test, which requires Two Full Actions. Once activated, the drone controller remains calibrated to the user until he stops using it; if given to another user, however, the new user must recalibrate the device. A character with a drone controller is typically also assigned one drone, which must remain within 50 metres of the drone controller to stay properly attuned to its signals. This drone follows the character with the controller and obey simple orders (such as using the Move Action to keep up with him, shielding him from harm with the Guardian Talent, and making Attack Actions against targets he designates). Rather than having their own Initiative, drones act immediately after their controller’s Turn in Structured Time. Once per Round, as a Half Action or Reaction, a character with a drone controller may make a Routine (+20) Tech-Use Test to assume personal control over one drone. Until the end of the Round, that drone uses its handler’s Ballistic Skill instead of its own.

snapshot.Description: Beast automatically gains 1 level. Beast tests WP-10*sum total of candies used. On failure, addicted to candy and must consume 1/mo or regress 1 level. Addiction can be cured by de-leveling once and testing against addiction again. If Beast regresses below 1, or if candies are used to level to 100 or greater, some interesting things might happen...

snapshot.Name: Max Revive
snapshot.Description: Beast controller injects into self. Beast is restored to full wounds with 0 fatigue. Controller tests T or gains 1 Corruption, 1 Insanity, and 1d5 Fatigue

snapshot.Name: Moldy Sandwich
snapshot.Description: Held item. Beast gains Regeneration(X), where X is 0.1*Max Wounds (rounded up)

snapshot.Name: Psychoactive Clay
snapshot.Description: Held item. Beast adds +2m and +2 reduction to screens created with Reflect or Light Screen

snapshot.Name: Everstone
snapshot.Description: Held item. Boosts ‘mon stats by 20/10 if the mon has 2/1 higher evolved stages. Prevents evolution.

snapshot.Name: Amasec
snapshot.Description: Fine spirits

snapshot.Name: Desoleum Fungus
snapshot.During: can invert result of any 1d100 roll during duration

snapshot.Name: Frenzon
snapshot.During: temporarily gain Frenzy talent; gain Frenzied condition

snapshot.Name: Lho-Sticks
snapshot.Description: Cigs

snapshot.Name: Ration Pack
snapshot.After: Eating during rest period of at least 2 hours removes +1 level of fatigue

snapshot.Name: Recaf
snapshot.Description: Cumulative penalty is -20 instead of -10

snapshot.Name: Sacred Unguents
snapshot.Immediate: immediately clear a jam (but with no further effect)
snapshot.During: weapon is immune to jamming for shots = clip size
snapshot.Description: Full Action to apply to weapon; choose Immediate or Duration effect when applying

snapshot.Name: Slaught
snapshot.After: T+0 or -20 to Agi and Per for 1d5hr

snapshot.Name: Spook
snapshot.During: grants a psychic power from T5-16 (p. 174); FP tests are made at PR 1.
snapshot.Description: Test WP+0 or gain 1d5 IP; Characters with PR using must also test WP+0; on fail gain 1 IP, on pass +1 PR and +25 to Psy Phenom

snapshot.Name: Stimm
snapshot.During: Ignores negative effects to characteristics from damage, crit damage, and Fatigue; also cannot be Stunned
snapshot.After: suffers -20 to Str/T/A test afterward for 1hr and gains 1 Fatigue

snapshot.Name: Tranq
snapshot.Description: TBD

snapshot.Name: Accelerai
snapshot.During: May make an extra attack when performing the Multiple Attacks Action
snapshot.After: +1 fatigue and T+0 or -5 Init for 1d5 days
snapshot.Description: Must pass T-20 or be Stunned for 1d5r to use; >4 DoF causes 1d10 dmg ignoring A/T

snapshot.Name: Corpse Obmulen
snapshot.After: +1 fatigue and S-10 or 1d10 Str dmg for 1 day or until another dose
snapshot.Description: Must pass T-20 or be Stunned for 1d5r to use; >4 DoF causes 1d10 dmg ignoring A/T

snapshot.Name: Eviscerine
snapshot.After: +1 fatigue and T-10 or lose Reaction in combat for 1d10hr or another dose
snapshot.Description: Must pass T-20 or be Stunned for 1d5r to use; >4 DoF causes 1d10 dmg ignoring A/T

snapshot.Name: Murder's Boon
snapshot.Description: Must pass T-20 or be Stunned for 1d5r to use; >4 DoF causes 1d10 dmg ignoring A/T

snapshot.Name: Shudderstep
snapshot.After: +1 fatigue and T+0 or pass out for 1d10+5m
snapshot.Description: Must pass T-20 or be Stunned for 1d5r to use; >4 DoF causes 1d10 dmg ignoring A/T

snapshot.Name: Slitherbind
snapshot.Immediate: 1 ftg per pt of PR (up to DoF)

snapshot.Name: Powa' Burst
snapshot.Effects: Roll 1d100 and cast a random Ork psychic power based on the result

snapshot.Name: Frazzle
snapshot.Effects: For each DoS after the first this attack may affect another additional target within 3m of the original for half damage. May not be Dodged by non-primary targets
snapshot.Notes: May only be cast via Powa' Burst

snapshot.Name: Up an' at 'Em
snapshot.Effects: All allied Orks within range ignore effects of Fatigue, gain bonus equal to 5*PR (max +30) to all tests to resist pinning and fear as well as reroll any rolls they must make on the Shock table.
snapshot.Notes: May only be cast via Powa' Burst

snapshot.Name: Warpath
snapshot.Effects: Allied Orks within radius gain bonus to melee damage equal to 1/2 PR rounded up. Each allied Ork within range may also reroll one failed WS test per round.
snapshot.Notes: May only be cast via Powa' Burst

snapshot.Name: Dis is Takin' Too Long!
snapshot.Effects: May immediately make a Run or Charge action as a FrA, increasing the maximum range of this move by an extra 2m for every DoS on the FP test. On a vehicle or voidship may instead use this power to grant any explorer on board a bonus equal to 5*PR on the next test that increases the vehicle's speed
snapshot.Notes: May only be cast via Powa' Burst

snapshot.Name: Smash da Gitz
snapshot.Notes: May only be cast via Powa' Burst

snapshot.Name: We'z Gotta be Lucky
snapshot.Notes: May only be cast via Powa' Burst

snapshot.Name: Zzap
snapshot.Notes: May only be cast via Powa' Burst

snapshot.Name: Ere We Go
snapshot.Notes: May only be cast via Powa' Burst

snapshot.Name: Deff Wave
snapshot.Notes: May only be cast via Powa' Burst

snapshot.Name: Krump 'Em All
snapshot.Notes: May only be cast via Powa' Burst

snapshot.Name: Ead to 'Ead
snapshot.Notes: May only be cast via Powa' Burst

snapshot.Name: I'z Gunna Squig Ya!
snapshot.Notes: May only be cast via Powa' Burst

snapshot.Name: Augur Array
snapshot.Effects(general): implanted Augur Array
snapshot.Effects(quality): P: single detection(either heat, radiation, emag) up to 20m. G: full auspex, can reroll all failed Perception-based tests

snapshot.Name: Autosanguine
snapshot.Effects(general): Always considered Lightly Damaged when healing. Heals 2dmg per day.

snapshot.Name: Baleful Eye
snapshot.Effects(general): Replaces an eye. Hot-shot laspistol with 10m range. No clip size, but jams cause loss of sight for rounds = DoF

snapshot.Name: Bionic Arms
snapshot.Effects(general): Replaces a lost arm
snapshot.Effects(quality): P: halve Agi (rounded up) for fine dexterity, WS/BS -5 using arm; G: +10 Agi for fine dexterity; B: as G, and +10 Str tests using the arm

snapshot.Name: Bionic Heart
snapshot.Effects(general): Replaces the heart
snapshot.Effects(quality): G/B: +1 Armor to Body (stacks) and Sprint talent

snapshot.Name: Bionic Legs
snapshot.Effects(general): Replaces a lost leg
snapshot.Effects(quality): P: Mv-1 and Agi+10 when running or fall prone; G: Spring and +20 Agi for jump/leap

snapshot.Name: Bionic Respiratory System
snapshot.Effects(general): Augments respiratory system. +20 to T vs airborne toxins and gas
snapshot.Effects(quality): P: -20 to Stealth (loud); G: full life support system (can function if organs fail) and can be discreet/unnoticable

snapshot.Name: Bionic Senses
snapshot.Effects(general): Replaces lost Eyes, Ears, or Nose
snapshot.Effects(quality): P: -20 to tests using the sense; G: +10 to tests using the sense and +20 to resist attacks on the sense itself. Can also incorporate magnifying lesnes, photo-visor, microbead, or Dark-sight trait (separate requisition to add on)

snapshot.Name: Calculus Logi Upgrade
snapshot.Effects(general): Grants +10 to Literacy, Logic, and SL tests

snapshot.Name: Cerebral Implants
snapshot.Effects(general): Alleviate brain damage(-1d10 WS, BS, A, I, F)
snapshot.Effects(quality): P: destroy personality and memories(as servitor); G: Unnatural Int(2) and +20 to Logic and Lore. Is Near Unique

snapshot.Name: Cranial Armor
snapshot.Effects(general): Armor+1 to Head. Stacks with other armor.

snapshot.Name: Enhanced Potentia Coil
snapshot.Effects(general): Improves all Maglev and Luminen abilities. See the entry in The Lathe Worlds pg. 66

snapshot.Name: Ferric Lure Implants
snapshot.Effects(general): Can, as FuA and WP+0, call unsecured metal object to hand. Cannot mass more than 1kg per WPB and must be within 20m.

snapshot.Name: Interface Port
snapshot.Effects(general): Can connect to machines using body port. Grants +10 to CL, Inquiry, and TU while connected to a relevant system.

snapshot.Name: Internal Reservoir
snapshot.Effects(general): No longer gain Fatigue from using Luminen Capacitors to recharge or attack, but each use depletes this resevoir by half. Restores to full after 1 day or resting

snapshot.Name: Lathes Mechadendrite Stabilisers
snapshot.Requirements: Mechanicus Implants Trait, Mechadendrite Use(Utility) talent
snapshot.Effects(general): HA to activate/deactivate. Braced, gain Sturdy, and ignore modifiers to movement due to gravity or uncertain stability. Grants +20 to climbing.

snapshot.Name: Locator Matrix
snapshot.Effects(general): User is aware of planetary poles direction, present location, relative velocity, altitude, time of day, and other valuable info.

snapshot.Name: Luminen Capacitor
snapshot.Effects(general): Allows character to charge devices or blast things. Requires 1m and Toughness test depending on device. See DE Core pg. 183.
snapshot.Effects(quality): P: -10 to all Toughness tests using this augment; G: +10 to all Toughness tests made using this augment

snapshot.Name: Maglev Coils
snapshot.Effects(general): Half Action to hover 20-30cm off of the ground for mins = to 1d10+TB. Must use HA each round to concentrate. Can slow fall, reducing fall damage to max 1d10+3 Impact. Activation drains coils and they can't be used for 24 hours.

snapshot.Name: Mechadendrite
snapshot.Requirements: Mechanicus Implants Trait, Mechadendrite Use talent(s)
snapshot.Effects(general): Come in Ballistic, Manipulator, Medicae, or Optical varieties. See DE Core p. 183

snapshot.Name: Memorance Implant
snapshot.Effects(general): Neurally-linked datavault and pict-capture system. Grants +10 to Trade(Loremancer) or other social tests where recorded information can be of value

snapshot.Name: Mind Impulse Unit (MIU)
snapshot.Effects(general): Can directly link to a tech device. Grants +10 to Tech-Use or Operate tests used in conjunction with MIU-linked devices
snapshot.Effects(quality): P: WP+0 to use and -10 penalty to interfacing device; G: +10 to interface and for Tech-Use, Operate, Logic, Inquiry, and BS tests made through the MIU.

snapshot.Name: MIU Weapon Interface
snapshot.Effects(general): Can fire a linked ranged weapon as FrA during turn (usually shoulder mounted)

snapshot.Name: Perinetus-Pattern Servo-Harness
snapshot.Effects(general): Counts as Manipulator and Utility mechadendrite, combi-tool, Fyceline Torch(standard Flamer), and Plasma Cutter(can burn through meter of adamantine plating per minute, and as Plasma Pistol w/ range 10m). Grants Flyer(6) in Null Gravity. Can use Reaction to make a single attack with any of this harness' weapons.

snapshot.Name: Respiratory Filter Implant
snapshot.Effects(general): Grants +20 to resist inhaled poisons, gas, or atmospheric toxins.

snapshot.Name: Scribe-Tines
snapshot.Effects(general): Grants +10 to all Lore skill tests

snapshot.Name: Subskin Armor
snapshot.Effects(general): Grants +2 Armor to Arms, Body, and Legs. Stacks with other armor.

snapshot.Name: Synthmuscle
snapshot.Effects(general): Grants Unnatural Str(1)
snapshot.Effects(quality): B: Unnatural Str(4) but -10 on all Agi tests due to mishapen body.

snapshot.Name: Vocal Implant
snapshot.Effects(general): Can shout a lot. Functions as a Laud Hailer

snapshot.Name: Volitor Implant
snapshot.Effects(general): Can be coded to not reveal certain information, remain in a set area, or perform a specific task. Subjects forced to counter this coding shut down, falling unconscious or possibly dying.

snapshot.Name: Subskin Hologuard
snapshot.Effects(general): Gives the character the ability to activate Hologuard armor as a Reaction or Half Action. User takes 2 dmg ignoring A/T per round when this armor is violently disabled (e.g. via a Haywire effect)
snapshot.Effects(quality): Poor quality requires Full Action to activate. Good+ quality does not inflict damage when disabled.

snapshot.Name: Guildsight
snapshot.Effects(general): Gain +20 to all skill tests which use eyesight, as well as all Perception characteristic tests. Gain the Unnatural Perception(2), Unnatural Ballistic Skill(2), and Dark Sight traits. Gain the benefits of the Magnifying Lenses and Photovisor tools.
snapshot.Effects(quality): Guildsight orbs are custom-made for each user; orbs extracted from a different owner count as Poor, and thus lose the Unnatural Perception, Unnatural BS, and Dark sight traits.

snapshot.Name: Ironbone Transformation
snapshot.Effects(general): Gain Unnatural Toughness(3), Unnatural Str(3), and +3 dmg to all Unarmed Attacks.
snapshot.Effects(quality): Poor quality halves the character's Agility and adds 40 kg to the character's weight. Normal quality reduces Agility by 20 and adds 40 kg to their weight. Good quality reduces Agility by 10 and adds 30 kg to weight. Best quality adds 30 kg to weight and does not reduce Agility.

snapshot.Name: Ame-no, Ward of the Peaks
snapshot.Additional_Effects: All out attacks with this weapon cannot be parried; bearer gains Psy Rating 1 (this cannot be upgraded through normal means).
snapshot.Description: An ancient, nearly unadorned katana-style blade. The steel is a shiny blue-grey and is completely free of defects. Carvings depicting a sinuous, winding serpent are traced along each side of the blade.

snapshot.Name: Ancient Bolt-Action Rifle
snapshot.Description: Originating from Holy Terra, this rifle is in very good condition for its age. Stamped as "Lee-Enfield Mk III." Exceedingly valuable.

snapshot.Name: Anzion's Pseudogenitor
snapshot.Additional_Effects: The bearer gains the benefit of the Lightning Attack talent with this weapon, even if they do not normally possess it. In addition, the bearer gains +20 to attack with this weapon. The bearer may attack with this weapon as a FrA on their turn (this attack still has the Attack keyword)
snapshot.Description: TBD

snapshot.Name: Archangel Mk II
snapshot.Description: Burnished in bright and brilliant gold, with the barrel shaped to resemble an angel. The plasma it fires is tinged red and gold.

snapshot.Name: Aspirant's Sanguinary Pistol
snapshot.Additional_Effects: When a bearer with the Bonded in Blood Trait kills a target with this weapon while aboard or within FBx10 meters of their Bonded Ally, the Bonded Ally regains 1 FP. When fired by a character without the Bonded in Blood trait there may be different outcomes.
snapshot.Description: An ancient but elegant Bolt Pistol artfully embossed w/ the iconography of the Blood Angels chapter as well as an inscribed, small logo of the Saiphan Elevatii on base of the hilt. An inscripted dedication runs along the side: "here, Service and Heroism have built Lineage and Legacy. Forwards, unto our Father's Future!"

snapshot.Name: Aspirant's Sanguinary Boltgun
snapshot.Additional_Effects: When a valid bearer (CB < 2; IB < 5; Human) kills a target with this weapon, they gain the benefits of the Bonded in Blood trait with one valid Ally within FBx10 meters until the end of the current encounter. Alledged to be indestructible.
snapshot.Description: An ancient, weathered Boltgun simply inscribed with the logo of the Blood Angels. A battered, worn, and haphazard 'inscription' reads in High Gothic: "my Brother, even the Aspirants should not be able to break this one"

snapshot.Name: Astartes Combi-Bolter
snapshot.Additional_Effects: Comes w/ Banestrike/Implosion/Dragonfire
snapshot.Description: A massive and ancient combi-bolter pattern reportedly used during the Horus Heresy. Taken from what appears to have been a member of the heretical Alpha Legion, this weapon nonetheless appears to be untainted and in excellent condition.

snapshot.Name: Brotherhood
snapshot.Description: Oddly well-conditioned tau rifle with plastic bands wrapped around the barrel, each with the names of fire warriors

snapshot.Name: Bulldog
snapshot.Additional_Effects: Mod-locked. Requires SB4 or higher to fire one-handed
snapshot.Description: TBD

snapshot.Name: Cerberus
snapshot.Additional_Effects: Requires SB4 or higher to fire one-handed. Can use any Solid Projectile ammo which fits a Hand Cannon.
snapshot.Description: A triple-barreled, triple-cylindered revolver, ornamented with scrollwork patterns, a small dog's head in place of the iron sights on each barrel, and a silver chain in the shape of a three-headed dog with a wing hanging from the end of the grip.

snapshot.Name: Claymore
snapshot.Additional_Effects: Mod-locked. Requires SB6 or higher to fire unbraced
snapshot.Description: A truly massive shotgun. The weapon is artfully styled with gore-spatter blood patterns.

snapshot.Name: Consort Honor-Blade(Las)
snapshot.Additional_Effects: Glaive that counts as Best-quality Power Axe and a las-style ranged weapon.
snapshot.Description: Ornate and inscribed with etchings of some sort of human ceremony

snapshot.Name: Consort Honor-Blade(Axe)
snapshot.Additional_Effects: Glaive that counts as Best-quality Power Axe and a las-style ranged weapon.
snapshot.Description: Ornate and inscribed with etchings of some sort of human ceremony

snapshot.Name: Culling
snapshot.Additional_Effects: Also functions as a scythe in melee (equiv to mono-spear). The bearer may burn a FP as a FuA and nominate a single target with Fate Points within range. That target is then marked until killed. The bearer knows whether he or she is on the same planet as or within 5 VU of the marked target, and can test the appropriate Very Hard Navigate(X) check as a HA to determine direction. As long as the bearer has a target marked (and that target is within range of the chosen power) they may spend a FP as a HA to cast either the Perfect Timing, Misfortune, and Scrier's Gaze powers with the marked character as the only target (Scrier's Gaze may only be cast on targets on the same planet as the bearer); these abilities are cast with a PR of 3. When the marked target is killed, you regain 1 FP slot.
snapshot.Description: Colored bone-white and shaped out of some bone-like substance, this weapon radiates menace. The long and narrow barrel ends with a scythe-like blade that hangs down beneath.

snapshot.Name: Da Rippa
snapshot.Additional_Effects: Each subsequent, consecutive firing increases the FA fire rate by 2; this is reset whenever the wielder goes a full round without firing the weapon. Best-quality when fired by Ork. (Overheats on 81+)
snapshot.Description: A truly enormous device of Orkish manufacture; on one end of the device, scrawled in overly-large childish handwriting, is the phrase "dis end at da gits"

snapshot.Name: Darloth Chain Cannon
snapshot.Description: TBD

snapshot.Name: Edge of Night
snapshot.Additional_Effects: Gains Felling(20) vs creatures with the Daemonic, Undying, or From Beyond traits. Creatures with the warp instability trait must immediately test against warp instability after taking damage from this weapon (with a penalty equal to the damage taken). May have additional effects against creatures bearing more unique warp curses...
snapshot.Description: A mysterious sword whose edge folds in and out of hidden dimensions, sometimes appearing straight and honed to an invisible edge and other times spiralling impossibly around the blade. Its material is unknown, but it bears the signs of modifications made by others than the original creators.

snapshot.Name: Elemental Assault
snapshot.Additional_Effects: FireSel switches between the 3 Special Qualities. Infinite ammo.
snapshot.Description: TBD

snapshot.Name: Executor Bolt Pistol (Bolt)
snapshot.Additional_Effects: Includes needle pistol
snapshot.Description: Emblazoned with the logo of the Imperial Inquisition

snapshot.Name: Executor Bolt Pistol (Needle)
snapshot.Additional_Effects: Includes bolt pistol
snapshot.Description: Emblazoned with the logo of the Imperial Inquisition

snapshot.Name: Hand of Retribution
snapshot.Additional_Effects: This is a small circular device that fits neatly into the palm of the hand and is easily concealable (+30 on any tests to hide). When the hand is opened however the device sprouts a thin blade of shimmering power, counting as a Best craftsmanship power weapon
snapshot.Description: This is a small circular device that fits neatly into the palm of the hand and is easily concealable. When the hand is opened however the device sprouts a thin blade of shimmering power

snapshot.Name: Khanite Chainblade
snapshot.Additional_Effects: Aesthetic Alterations (very pretty). Appears to react to blood and gore...
snapshot.Description: Sinuous, indigo-shading-into-violet guards, with silvery teeth. It is strangely, betwitchingly beautiful.

snapshot.Name: Kusanagi, Voice of the Wind
snapshot.Additional_Effects: Bearer has a 70% force field with no overload that can only be used versus attacks outside of melee range. bearer gains Psy Rating 1 (this cannot be upgraded through normal means).
snapshot.Description: An ancient, nearly unadorned katana-style blade. The steel is a shiny blue-grey and is completely free of defects. Carvings depicting a sinuous, winding serpent are traced along each side of the blade.

snapshot.Name: Masamune, Spirit of the Warrior
snapshot.Description: An ancient, nearly unadorned katana-style blade. The steel is a shiny blue-grey and is completely free of defects. Carvings depicting a sinuous, winding serpent are traced along each side of the blade.

snapshot.Name: Midnight Essence
snapshot.Additional_Effects: Righteous Fury adds the Graviton quality to the attack, but may have additional effects on the user...
snapshot.Description: A large, jet-black alien weapon with persistent wavy curvature and striking sharpened edges; silvery alien blades are also positioned like monstrous teeth along its barrel and sides. The weapon constantly feels warm to the touch, and any who spend much time near this weapon might swear they see something else moving in the shining reflections off its inky black surface.

snapshot.Name: Modified Inferno Pistol
snapshot.Additional_Effects: Mod-locked
snapshot.Description: A puzzlingly-complex combined pair of inferno pistols.

snapshot.Name: Prismatic Fist(Las)
snapshot.Additional_Effects: Can be fired alone or with both other Prismatic Fist weapons as a Half Action
snapshot.Description: TBD

snapshot.Name: Prismatic Fist(Melta)
snapshot.Additional_Effects: Can be fired alone or with both other Prismatic Fist weapons as a Half Action
snapshot.Description: TBD

snapshot.Name: Prismatic Fist(Plasma)
snapshot.Additional_Effects: Can be fired alone or with both other Prismatic Fist weapons as a Half Action
snapshot.Description: TBD

snapshot.Name: Da Rally Flagg
snapshot.Additional_Effects: Grants the bearer access to the Dis iz Takin' Too Long! and 'Ere We Go powers from the Weirdboy psychic discipline. When the bearer triggers psychic phenomea while wielding this weapon psychic phenomea are chosen from the Weird Fings and 'Eadbang tables instead of the standard. May have additional benefits when used in conjunction with a vehicular challenge/engagement...
snapshot.Description: A large coppa staff topped with a brass Orkoid mushroom. Has an attached hand-stitched checkered flag made out of dyed squig leather.

snapshot.Name: Shadowglass
snapshot.Additional_Effects: This weapon can, allegedly, destroy or separate an Egarian mentat from its host. It seems fragile, as if it might have limited uses...
snapshot.Description: An impossibly-sharp fragment of some strange glass-like substance bound to a crude wrought-iron hilt. Mysterious shapes seem to move into and out of the glass, as if it was still part of some greater whole...

snapshot.Name: Sturm und Drang
snapshot.Additional_Effects: (Sturm-final shot in clip deals an additional 1d10 damage)(Drang-Righteous Fury crits are at +2 on CD table)
snapshot.Description: A pair of ancient pistols, lovingly maintained and rebuilt over the years. These pistols match descriptions of ancient Terran weapons from before the Age of Strife.

snapshot.Name: Svalinndar
snapshot.Additional_Effects: AP 8 Arm/Body
snapshot.Description: An ancient iron and wood shield, with carven and filagreed figures from ancient Skald lore. The shield is persistently rimmed with frost, and is always bitingly cold to the touch.

snapshot.Name: The Black Hand
snapshot.Description: A massive, black, scaled gauntlet running from the upper arm down to a wicked clawed grip

snapshot.Name: The Twin Dragons
snapshot.Additional_Effects: Twinned (Dmg-2, Pen-2 w/o both guns)
snapshot.Description: A golden pistol with a barrel carved and ornamented to look like a dragon's mouth. The name "Nite Ell" is carved into the hilt

snapshot.Name: Voidblade
snapshot.Description: A pair of impossibly thin blades which curve out from opposite ends of the grip. They appear to phase in and out of existence. The hilt is an unknown, oily looking metal which glows slightly.
snapshot.Discovery_Location: Looted from Antigonius aux Sextus on Hadria

snapshot.Name: Volkite Disruptor
snapshot.Description: A powerful pistol that bears striking similarity to an ancient Horus Heresy pattern weapon used by both traitor and loyalist Astartes. This weapon is either incredibly well-maintained and modified or recently designed and constructed based on the older patterns.

snapshot.Name: Zennyo, Soul of the Depths
snapshot.Additional_Effects: Fighting defensively grants you an immediate standard attack as a FrA. bearer gains Psy Rating 1 (this cannot be upgraded through normal means).
snapshot.Description: An ancient, nearly unadorned katana-style blade. The steel is a shiny blue-grey and is completely free of defects. Carvings depicting a sinuous, winding serpent are traced along each side of the blade.

snapshot.Name: Bloodpike
snapshot.Additional_Effects: Bloodseeker: wielder can, as a reaction, make a standard attack against any target that enters into this weapon's range with a -30 penalty.
snapshot.Description: A wicked black pike which ever-so-subtly draws all exposed blood towards itself. Both blade and haft seem to drink in blood on contact.

snapshot.Name: Nightbane
snapshot.Additional_Effects: Illusory: -10 to evade against this weapon
snapshot.Description: A wavy, shadowy sword that can, at times, glow with a faint violet light

snapshot.Name: The Unseen
snapshot.Additional_Effects: Spellbound: wielder gains the ability to cast the Invisibility psychic power using the weapon's WP of 57
snapshot.Description: A stark blueish-black blade like a spike, with a single glowing fleshy eye bulging out of the hilt.

records.name: 5x Buglike Xenos heads on a string

snapshot.Name: 5x Buglike Xenos heads on a string
snapshot.Description: chitinous heads that manage to somehow look both completely alien and yet somehow aberrantly human.

records.name: Alien organ in a stasis chamber

snapshot.Name: Alien organ in a stasis chamber
snapshot.Description: A strange, distended Xenos organ of some kind, suspended in a stasis pod. Its tell-tale rythmic beat can, somehow, be heard from outside the pod.

snapshot.Name: Ancient Astartes Power Armor
snapshot.Known_Mechanics: As Artificer Power Armor
snapshot.Description: Taken from the tomb of Sentikal Blayne. Ancient Luna Wolf armor

snapshot.Name: Archaeotech Preysense Goggles
snapshot.Known_Mechanics: Best-quality Preysense Goggles that inflict -5 Awareness when used in Darkness, but add +2 DoS to any successful Awareness check in these conditions
snapshot.Description: TBD

snapshot.Name: Anzion's Pseudogenitor
snapshot.Known_Mechanics: Counts as Medical and Manipulator mechadendrites. Unique melee wpn profile
snapshot.Description: TBD

snapshot.Name: Cantic Thrallnet
snapshot.Known_Mechanics: Allows for a direct mental link to Adeptus Mechanicus servitors, servo skulls, and other AdMech automata. Once per round, the user can as a FrA either grant Inspiration to 1 linked ally or grant all linked allies the benefit of one talent they possess.
snapshot.Description: TBD

snapshot.Name: Case of Cybernetics
snapshot.Known_Mechanics: 2 Best-quality cybernetic arm disguised as human skin--1 with an inbuilt compact grenade launcher and the other an inbuilt compact hot-shot laspistol, a pair of best-quality cybernetic eyes that are disguised as human eyes and count as memorance implants, a locator matrix implant, and a small set of surgical tools for cybernetic installation.
snapshot.Description: The case exterior is unmarked, but the interior has a barely-noticable serial number on the inside of the case rim.

snapshot.Name: Chalice of Sorrow
snapshot.Description: TBD

snapshot.Name: Charon Battle Servitor
snapshot.Known_Mechanics: As Murder Servitor, but with 25 Wounds, 9 AP All, and a Power Axe + Heavy Flamer with the Hulking Trait
snapshot.Description: TBD

snapshot.Name: Chivalry
snapshot.Known_Mechanics: Hat which can be used as Smoke Grenade.
snapshot.Description: Has a name sewn onto the inside.

snapshot.Name: Crystal Skull
snapshot.Known_Mechanics: Bearer can, as a FrA on their turn, store the results of any roll on the psychic phenomena table within the skull. The bearer may spend a FrA to trigger the stored psy phenom at any time (though the skull must be within WB score in meters and the bearer must possess a psy rating). If the skull is currently storing a Psy Phenom, no additional phenomena may be stored.
snapshot.Description: A gleaming human-esque skull made out of glimmering purple crystal. Taken from a strange crashed Ork.

snapshot.Name: Dragon's Tooth
snapshot.Description: A massive dragon's tooth. Traditional tokens for the Skaaldir, these teeth are often carved and formed into daggers or the hilts for personal weapons

snapshot.Name: Egarian Puzzle Cube
snapshot.Known_Mechanics: Solving the puzzle allows the user to bond to an Egarian mentat
snapshot.Description: Perfect cube with strange sliding plates

snapshot.Name: Eldar Histories
snapshot.Known_Mechanics: Can train FL(Eldar)+0 after studying these books for 3 time increments(with a successful Linguistics(Eldar)-10 check)
snapshot.Description: TBD

snapshot.Name: Fhaisorr
snapshot.Known_Mechanics: Bonded character gains 1 FP. If the Fhaisorr is ever killed, lost, or otherwise un-bonded, this FP is lost. While in communication with the Fhaisorr, the bonded character can spend 1 FP as a Half Action to gain 70% shield until the end of their next turn or see a vision of possible deaths ooc. Each initial use of the ability AFTER THE FIRST IN ANY SESSION inflicts 1 Insanity, and successive uses in a single encounter inflict additional Insanity...
snapshot.Description: A small, color-shifting bird.

snapshot.Name: Flying sphere
snapshot.Known_Mechanics: Sphere falls against gravity
snapshot.Description: Tiny perfect metal sphere

snapshot.Name: Gemstones in Glass
snapshot.Known_Mechanics: PR+2 for one pwr use. Recharge ???
snapshot.Description: Tiny shards of strange gemstones are embedded in perfect, unbreakable glass spheres. They glow with warp-light.

snapshot.Name: Hesperidan Sapling
snapshot.Known_Mechanics: Touching the tree can remove bad memories and insanity
snapshot.Description: A perfectly-white tree grown from an unknown fruit from Hesperida

snapshot.Name: Ingot of Iridescent Metal
snapshot.Description: A mysterious ingot of metal with a strange oily sheen. Melts in the cold, but is diamond-hard when heated above 30 C.

snapshot.Name: Karelian Repulsor
snapshot.Known_Mechanics: Provides 25% field with 01 Overload. Targets which charge the bearer must test S-20. Other targets moving into melee must test S+0.
snapshot.Description: An ancient field generator linked with a light repulsor field

snapshot.Name: Large Brass Cog
snapshot.Description: 1 meter in diameter, and embossed/embellished with gothic-esque script

snapshot.Name: Lux-Equine
snapshot.Known_Mechanics: Summons Lux-Equus creature.
snapshot.Description: A small, glowing white horse made out of what appears to be solid light

snapshot.Name: Map of the Reach
snapshot.Description: An ancient map of the Reach. Features 4 circled systems.

snapshot.Name: Morrowine
snapshot.Known_Mechanics: Drastically boosts memory/recall, but colors all memories with deep sorrow
snapshot.Description: An ink-black liquid suspended in a primitive glass-esque bottle.

snapshot.Name: Mysterious Jet-black stone
snapshot.Known_Mechanics: One side of stone is reflective and seems to show things that are not physically there
snapshot.Description: TBD

snapshot.Name: Prismatic Fist
snapshot.Known_Mechanics: As Cybernetic hand. Integrates several weapon profiles: Contains built-in Hotshot Las, Plasma, and Melta pistols
snapshot.Description: TBD

snapshot.Name: Red and Blue Flags
snapshot.Known_Mechanics: Seems to warp the minds of those who spend too much time near them...
snapshot.Description: Heraldry of the 343rd Mechanized Infantry and the 49th Recon (both from Chinchare) during the end of the 37th millennium. During Abbadon's 6th Black Crusade, the units were deployed on maneuvers to the death world of Prosan for training exercises. Unbeknownst to most, one of the units intended to turn traitor and support Abbadon's war effort. However, when the war came, both units were too invested in their bitter rivalry to heed their respective calls to battle--and thus they continued their meaningless wargame on a strategically useless backwater while the sector burned around them; bringing aid to neither side. At the end of the conflict, they were cursed by both the Dark Gods and the high priests of the Imperium (for their ineptitude, by Khorne, and for their lack of faith, by the Lord High Ecclesiarch). Executed to the man, the spectres of both regiments found themselves cursed to forever live out their eternal, fruitless struggle (constantly reliving episodes of their strange conflict). Both banners have, despite their ignominious origins, been taken up as unit banners for contemporary forces--but each time, those who bear these banners always seem to relive the struggles of their cursed, insane forebears

snapshot.Name: Retribution Bolt Shells
snapshot.Known_Mechanics: Ammunition for Bolt weapons: In all respects, these count as bolt shells and can be loaded into a non-astartes Bolt weapon. However, in the round following a successful hit, they will deal their damage again as the secondary charge explodes. 30 shells.
snapshot.Description: These shells are each marked in High Gothic with tiny, inscribed incantations and blessings, as well as the markings of an obscure Adeptas Sororitas chapter.

snapshot.Name: Rough pink crystal
snapshot.Description: Impossibly hard pink crystal. Cannot be removed/reduced/cut by weapons

snapshot.Name: Sanctified Box
snapshot.Description: Taken from Xerak's office.

snapshot.Name: Sanghelos Combat Armor
snapshot.Known_Mechanics: Common-quality Light Power Armor with 1/2 the normal weight, AP+1 to all locations, no strength bonus, no power requirements, doesn't increase size by 1 level, built for ~+2ft ~+150lb larger xenos
snapshot.Description: TBD

snapshot.Name: Shattered Hilt of Indridi's Blade
snapshot.Description: A warped, blackened greatsword hilt. One of the most legendary weapons in the entirety of the reach. Ruined hilt worth at least 1pf. If reforged, worth a lot more.

snapshot.Name: Strange Tree Branch
snapshot.Description: Tree branch run-through with what looks like layers of silver. 5 Perfect silver leaves are still attached.

snapshot.Name: Sunshot rounds
snapshot.Known_Mechanics: Targets hit suffer -30 to Stealth and grant +10 to hit them. Awareness +20 to detect them in the dark. Can be used with Autoguns, Autopistols, and comparable SP weapons.
snapshot.Description: Nondescript ammo, but slightly warm to the touch and glows lightly in the dark

snapshot.Name: Vanishing Fabric
snapshot.Description: A strange xenos fabric with a greenish metallic sheen. Parts of it appear and reappear randomly.

snapshot.Name: Void-Stalker Cloak
snapshot.Known_Mechanics: Stealth + 30 and automatic success on Stealth in darkness or dim light.
snapshot.Description: A light, soft black cape made of some sort of xenos hide. It always remains slightly warm to the touch

snapshot.Name: Wayfarer's Browncoat
snapshot.Known_Mechanics: AP 2 to Arms, Body. Grants Unnatural BS(4). This ability is suppressed if the bearer uses AP from a different set of armor.
snapshot.Description: TBD

snapshot.Name: Whispersilk Cloth
snapshot.Description: A swath of nearly weightless fabric taken from the Slaaneshi blademistress

snapshot.Name: Wraithbone Flute
snapshot.Known_Mechanics: Seems to produce strange, alien sounds
snapshot.Description: A carved wraithbone flute, with Eldar runes along the base.

snapshot.Name: Xenos Death-Dream's Fragment Multikey
snapshot.Known_Mechanics: Made out of some mind-bending purple crystal, this key is at one enthralling and elusive. It acts as a best-quality multikey but requires an Ordinary Int test to use it. Success grants an additional +10 to use, failure inflicts 1 Insanity. Awareness checks to locate this item suffer -20
snapshot.Description: TBD

snapshot.Name: Ancient Manual of (Poxian) Health
snapshot.Known_Mechanics: ??? (might improve one reader's Toughness permanently)
snapshot.Description: Some warp-infused tome crafted by unknown hands. Its initial page claims to be able to grant the dedicated reader a permanent infusion of vitality

snapshot.Name: Da Squiggin' Stick
snapshot.Known_Mechanics: Single-use. This item may be used once to allow the bearer to make an opposed WP check with a single living (non-machine, non-daemonic) target within range and line of sight; on failure, that target is permanently transformed into a squig. Affected targets may burn a fate point to reduce this permanent effect to a temporary one
snapshot.Description: Yuri's package is wrapped in a strange thin parchment covered in depictions of grotesque abhumans with enormous eyes positioned in strange ritual poses. The item within appears to be a single long tooth--taken from some unknown beast--with a small, oddly-soft squig doll speared on the end. When squeezed, it creates an odd squealing sound that echoes off the walls far longer than it should.

snapshot.Name: Da (smol) Red Buttun
snapshot.Known_Mechanics: Single-use. This item may be used once at the start of the bearer's turn to allow them to make an immediate Operate(Surface or Aeronautica) test. Upon success, this immediately allows any vehicle they are driving to perform a single vehicular action of the driver's choice. The vehicle also doubles its movement speed for a number of minutes equal to their DoS on the check
snapshot.Description: Rico's package is wrapped in colored parchment depicting some of Pox's strange nocturnal flying mammals. The item inside appears to be a single large, gently glowing red button dangling several wires which--presumably--used to connect to some sort of holy machine. The button seemingly begs you to press it.

snapshot.Name: Annuver Wun
snapshot.Known_Mechanics: Single-use. This item summons an additional Ogg to the user's location. This Ogg may have varying weaponry and traits, but will (probably) stick around to help you for a little while. If you're in combat, he'll even (most likely) fight your enemies too!
snapshot.Description: Ogg's package is a tiny sphere wrapped in purple paper. Inside, suspended in glass, is what looks like a miniature figure of Ogg--one which glows when exposed to warp energy

snapshot.Name: Paint (fer) da Targut
snapshot.Known_Mechanics: Single-use. Designate a vehicular target within throwing range, then attempt a BS test versus the target. On success, you and all allies gain +10 to hit the target until the end of the current combat. Additionally, you may choose to enter a Frenzy on a successful hit--if you do so, instead of gaining bonuses to WS, you instead gain those bonuses to BS and must attack the painted target if possible
snapshot.Description: Gnaeus' package is a wrapped wooden box, from which leaks a blueish sticky substance. Inside the box itself Gnaeus finds a single large paint can, labelled "umie paint"

snapshot.Name: Da  Boss' Hittin' (er Trowin) Stik
snapshot.Known_Mechanics: Single-use. The user may, after declaring an attack (either thrown or melee) action, use this item to replace a single improvised weapon's attack profile with the weapon profile of any applicable melee (or thrown/grenade) weapon known to the party (unique weapons excluded, unless a party member is currently in possession of that item).
snapshot.Description: Jack's present was a hastily wrapped...stick? Yup, it's a stick. A weirdly thick one, too. There's a rock stuck on one end as well? Great. Just great.

snapshot.Known_Mechanics: Tome
snapshot.Description: A blood-smeared tome bound in what appears to be stitched leathers taken from a wide array of creatures. Whispers can be heard when nearby...

snapshot.Name: Glyphs of the Collector
snapshot.Known_Mechanics: Identifies the bearer as an ally to some faction of the mysterious Necrons
snapshot.Description: A small disc made of some unknown smooth black metal. It appears to glow--extremely faintly--in the dark.

snapshot.Name: Freendship Circly Thing
snapshot.Known_Mechanics:
Single-use. This item may be used once to allow the bearer to make a WP test as a free action. For every Degree of Success (up to a maximum equal to their Psy Rating), the character may select one willing ally within LoS who, for the purposes of talents/traits/powers counts as an Ork until either the end of the encounter, session, or arc (player's choice). During this time, the caster gains a random psychic power from the Weirdboy psychic power table and may cast that power until this item's effects wear off. After use, the player may select one Dramatic Moment entry in the Dramatic Moment table and replace it with the effects of this item. Said effects will be adjusted slightly to function without the physical item.

NOTE: This item is viable only through 1/1/27, after which it will cease functioning in any way and be, at best, a decorative oddity.
snapshot.Description: Talvdin's package is a simple necklace ending in a string of...teeth carved into the shapes of Talvdin's allies. A small reservoir of power could be detected in the charm; breaking it could unleash the power on Talvdin's allies...

snapshot.Name: Da Gitfinda
snapshot.Known_Mechanics:
Single-use. This item may be used once as a Free Action to give a single pistol carried by the wielder the ability to make their next Single-shot attack through an obstructing surface of up to 1m in width (up to 15 points of this obstruction's AR is ignored for the purposes of this single shot). When using the Gitfinda the character can form line of sight to the target--for purposes of firing the weapon only--if these conditions are met. The weapon gains the Recharge property for this attack (and thus cannot be used to attack next turn). After use, the player may select one Dramatic Moment entry in the Dramatic Moment table and replace it with the effects of this item. Said effects will be adjusted slightly to function without the physical item.

NOTE: This item is viable only through 1/1/27, after which it will cease functioning in any way and be, at best, a decorative oddity.
snapshot.Description: Rex's package was an improbably-curvy and yet blocky...scope? The lens at the end had a bright red reticle drawn in orky finger paint on it...yet somehow looking through the scope provided vision...of a sort.

snapshot.Name: Supa Hidin Gas
snapshot.Known_Mechanics:
Single-use. This device functions as a grenade which may be only be deployed in the holder's current position as a Half Action Attack. Doing so immediately creates a smoke cloud of radius 10 centered on the bearer which lasts for 1d10+5 rounds AND which also pushes any other characters--friend or foe--to a position at least 5m away from the user. Additionally, this particular smoke cloud blocks Auspex sight, psychic abilities, and all vision granted by the Unnatural Senses trait. Shooting into or out of this dense smoke is extra difficult and inflicts a -40 penalty. After use, the player may select one Dramatic Moment entry in the Dramatic Moment table and replace it with the effects of this item. Said effects will be adjusted slightly to function without the physical item.

NOTE: This item is viable only through 1/1/27, after which it will cease functioning in any way and be, at best, a decorative oddity.
snapshot.Description: Uiyeldi's package is a big grey...cannonball? Some sort of ancient terran thing which appeared during the Farsight flash-tutoring on the Imperium. It was pain"pull mee to hide and get da gitz away"

snapshot.Name: Shoutin' Cone
snapshot.Known_Mechanics:
Single-use. For one round, any uses of the Warrant of Trade or Officer abilities which affect a single target can affect up to FB targets within WPBx10 meters. After use, the player may select one Dramatic Moment entry in the Dramatic Moment table and replace it with the effects of this item. Said effects will be adjusted slightly to function without the physical item.

NOTE: This item is viable only through 1/1/27, after which it will cease functioning in any way and be, at best, a decorative oddity.
snapshot.Description: Harys' package is a simple...cone? The "instructions" crudely drawn on the side read "shout at ur freendz wiv dis and dey listen gud"

snapshot.Name: Da Fixit Rok
snapshot.Known_Mechanics:
Single-use. The user may use any desired method to bring this rock into contact with a piece of technology (excluding vehicles, voidships, and similar items. Components of these may be valid targets). Said piece of technology--if malfunctioning in some way--immediately begins functioning properly for 1d10+WPB rounds--after which it resumes its original malfunctioning behavior. During this period the item in question is immune to additional effects which might cause further impairment or malfunction (such as Haywire fields). After use, the player may select one Dramatic Moment entry in the Dramatic Moment table and replace it with the effects of this item. Said effects will be adjusted slightly to function without the physical item.

NOTE: This item is viable only through 1/1/27, after which it will cease functioning in any way and be, at best, a decorative oddity.
snapshot.Description: Augustine's package was...a rock. Seriously. There was a tag attached to the rock with a drawing of an Ork using the Rok to "motivate" some large contraption. The Orkoid instructions indicated that the rock was somehow capable of restoring function to damanged or malfunctioning technology.

snapshot.Name: Temporally Unmoored
snapshot.Description: Past and present, cause and effect, now and not--these vessels seem to have a complicated relationship with time itself...
snapshot.Effect: If destroyed, as long as at least one vessel with this Complication is still intact, the others reappear at its location 4 months after destruction with 10 CP.
